---
<<<<<<< HEAD
title: "Publications"
title-block: false
=======
title: " "
>>>>>>> c9c25136c8f36683ccdd3e83f1391a74a10a43f1
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-banner}
![](images/publication.png){.page-banner-img alt="Publications"}
:::


## Journal Articles

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-title">
<a href="https://www.kci.go.kr/kciportal/landing/article.kci?arti_id=ART003271852" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
A Professional Development Program for Enhancing Geography Teachers’ AI–Digital Competence Based on the TPACK–DBL Framework </br>
- Development and Application of Interactive Teaching–Learning Web Apps
</a>
</div>
<div class="pub-authors">
[2025] Sang-Il Lee, Soyoung Lee
</div>
<div class="pub-tags">
<span class="pub-tag">TPACK-DBL</span>
<span class="pub-tag">AI–digital competence</span>
<span class="pub-tag">geography education</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-title">
<a href="https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1002/psp.70049" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
An Extension of Migration Effectiveness Indices: Accounting for the Impact of Migration on Population Structure
</a>
</div>
<div class="pub-authors">
[2025] Sechang Kim, Sang-Il Lee
</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-title">
<a href="https://www.kci.go.kr/kciportal/landing/article.kci?arti_id=ART003188332" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Development of a programming-based instructional program to enhance digital competency of pre-service social studies teachers
</a>
</div>
<div class="pub-authors">
[2025] 이상일,  고보경,  고준보,  김세창,  김우형,  임철일
</div>
<div class="pub-tags">
<span class="pub-tag">digital competency</span>
<span class="pub-tag">pre-service teachers</span>
<span class="pub-tag">social studies education</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-title">
<a href="https://www.kci.go.kr/kciportal/landing/article.kci?arti_id=ART003188332" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
A Multi-Scale Analysis of Age-Specific Migration Unidirectionality in South Korea
</a>
</div>
<div class="pub-authors">
[2024] Sang-Il Lee, Soyoung Lee, Sechang Kim
</div>
<div class="pub-tags">
<span class="pub-tag">인구이동 편향성</span>
<span class="pub-tag">연령-특수적 인구이동 유효도 지수</span>
<span class="pub-tag">다중스케일</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-title">
<a href="https://www.kci.go.kr/kciportal/landing/article.kci?arti_id=ART003188332" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
The Variety and Complementarity of Migration Data in South Korea:
A Comparison of Resident Register and Register-Based Census Data
</a>
</div>
<div class="pub-authors">
[2024] Sang-Il Lee, Deaheon Cho
</div>
<div class="pub-tags">
<span class="pub-tag">migration data</span>
<span class="pub-tag">resident register</span>
<span class="pub-tag">register-based census</span>
</div>
</div>


## Theses

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-title">
<a href="https://s-space.snu.ac.kr/handle/10371/229465" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Regionalization of the Seoul Metropolitan Area Using Graph Transformer-Based Representation Learning and Spatially Constrained Clustering
</a>
</div>
<div class="pub-authors">
[M.A. Thesis, 2025] Heamin Jeon
</div>
<div class="pub-tags">
<span class="pub-tag">그래프 딥러닝</span>
<span class="pub-tag">그래프 트랜스포머</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-title">
<a href="https://s-space.snu.ac.kr/handle/10371/210502" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
A Study on Internal Migration Modeling based on the Spatial Demographic Perspective: Utilizing Cross-Classified Multilevel Model
</a>
</div>
<div class="pub-authors">
[M.A. Thesis, 2024] Sechang Kim
</div>
<div class="pub-tags">
<span class="pub-tag">공간인구학</span>
<span class="pub-tag">교차분류 다수준 모형</span>
</div>
</div>


## Conference Presentations

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-title">
<a href="SLIDES_OR_URL" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Presentation Title Example
</a>
</div>
<div class="pub-authors">
Conference Name, 2025 — Presenter Name
</div>
<div class="pub-tags">
<span class="pub-tag">Poster</span>
<span class="pub-tag">Conference</span>
</div>
</div>
